content.problemStatement: Given an array of integers arr[] and an integer target.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer N, denoting the size of the array. The second line contains N space-separated integers, representing the array elements. The third line contains an integer target.
content.outputFormat: For variant 1, output "YES" if there exist two numbers in the array that sum up to the target, otherwise output "NO". For variant 2, output the indices of the two numbers that sum up to the target, separated by a space. If no such pair exists, output "-1 -1".

sampleTestCases.explanation: arr[1] + arr[3] = 14. So, the answer is “YES” for first variant for second variant output will be : [1,3].
There exist no such two numbers whose sum is equal to the target.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed
